name: Bootstrap
description: Bootstrap is a liquidity-compounding protocol built for Solana tokens launched on pump.fun. Instead of creator fees being extracted from the ecosystem, Bootstrap automatically routes them into a compounding loop of buybacks and LP provision that runs autonomously every 30 minutes. The protocol addresses the core architectural problem behind memecoin failures: liquidity stays flat while price grows, creating fragile pools that can't absorb real exits. Bootstrap turns creator fee revenue into infrastructure, progressively deepening liquidity pools so that trading conditions improve over time rather than degrade. The $BOOTSTRAP token powers the protocol and serves as a live demonstration of the compounding mechanism on PumpSwap.
